title: Record KRN MCP STDIO transport boundary
rationale: The local STDIO transport is verified enough to become reviewed project memory, but it must not be treated as a deployed connector or write surface.
proposed_change: Add a reviewed memory note describing the allowlisted read-only STDIO transport and its non-claims.
interpretation_caveat: This proposal is a reviewable request only; it does not approve memory changes, mutate source ledgers, expose MCP tools, prove dashboard readiness, or prove productivity lift.
